overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character moves from an outdoor entrance corridor through a courtyard and into a grand inner sanctum featuring a massive central statue and ornate throne.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance corridor with hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple entrance corridor between walls covered in colorful hieroglyphics

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at attention holding a spear
temple guard standing at attention holding a spear

entered.detail: massive stone gate structure with carved reliefs marking the temple entrance
tall stone walls covered in painted Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures
large ceremonial bowls with burning flames flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through a covered corridor flanked by hieroglyphic-covered walls and burning braziers. Two guards stand at attention near the entrance as the camera moves forward toward an opening into a brighter courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with palm trees and decorative plants

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open courtyard with palm trees and sky visible
turning right toward the main inner temple entrance with red carpet

agents.ego_description: moving through the sunlit courtyard and turning toward the inner sanctum entrance

notable_agents.action: temple guard walking across the courtyard toward the entrance

entered.detail: large potted palm trees arranged along the courtyard pathways
ornate black and gold planters containing lush green plants
elaborate temple entrance with columns and hanging red fabrics

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit courtyard filled with palm trees and decorative planters. After briefly exploring, the character turns toward the main temple entrance where a red carpet leads between large hieroglyphic walls toward the inner sanctum.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctum entrance corridor transitioning to grand hall

events.description: entering the dimly lit interior from the bright courtyard, visibility adjusts to darker space
emerging from narrow corridor into the vast grand hall with massive central statue visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple entrance into the darker interior sanctum, approaching the grand hall

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead into the inner sanctum

entered.detail: massive striped columns with red and white bands supporting the ceiling
colossal dark statue of a seated pharaoh or deity at the far end of the hall
purple and white fabric banners hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dimly lit temple interior, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. Moving through a corridor lined with striped columns and hanging fabrics, the character emerges into a grand hall where a massive dark statue dominates the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial hall with massive central statue and throne

events.description: slowing approach as character nears the throne platform at the base of the statue
passing between large columns that temporarily frame and then obscure the view of the statue

agents.ego_description: walking down the long ceremonial hall toward the massive central statue, observing flower petals scattered on the white marble floor

entered.detail: raised platform with steps leading up to the massive statue's throne
tall standing statues of guardians flanking the approach to the throne
burning fire bowls on stands emitting smoke and light

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the grand hall toward the colossal statue, passing between striped columns and burning braziers. Flower petals are scattered across the marble floor leading to the throne platform, while the massive statue looms larger as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: throne platform at the base of the massive statue with detailed carvings

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full height and detail of the massive seated statue
panning left to examine side niche statues, burning braziers, and architectural details

agents.ego_description: approaching the throne and examining the intricate details of the massive statue, decorative fan structure, and surrounding ceremonial objects

entered.detail: ornate golden throne with detailed carvings at the base of the statue
large ceremonial fan with red and gold feathers behind the throne
detailed statues of deities in wall niches flanking the main statue

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the throne platform and the camera pans up to reveal the massive scale of the central statue. The view examines the ornate throne, decorative fan structure, and side niche statues, with burning braziers providing warm flickering light against the stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a guarded temple entrance through a sunlit courtyard and into a monumental, dimly lit inner sanctum. It begins in a covered corridor flanked by burning braziers and hieroglyphic walls, moving past standing guards toward a bright opening. As the camera emerges into a sun-drenched courtyard filled with palm trees, the scene shifts toward a red carpet that leads between towering walls and into the shadows of the temple interior. The environment then transitions through a corridor of striped columns and hanging fabrics, opening into a grand hall where flower petals scatter across a marble floor leading toward a colossal dark statue. Finally, the camera reaches the throne platform and pans upward to reveal the massive scale of the central figure and its ornate surroundings, illuminated by the warm, flickering light of braziers against the stone.
